title: The Overflow and Circulation Ritual
subtitle: A five-part ritual for deepening your relationship with giving, receiving, and continuous flow
excerpt: A Week 9 ritual from a 12-week money program. The practice has five steps: Prepare, Release, Allow, Integrate, and Anchor. Together they build a felt sense of money as a current that moves toward you and away from you with equal ease — and that loss and gain are part of the same circulating whole.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 9 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448). The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the start of a week when you want to anchor the sense of overflow and generosity, or any morning when money feels tight and you want to return to a wider sense of what's in motion.

content.text: A five-step ritual for building a felt sense of overflow and continuous circulation. The ritual moves through preparation, release, allow, integration, and anchor — five steps that move from whatever the week is carrying to a clear, grounded sense of money as a current that flows both ways.

Light a candle or hold something meaningful — a coin, a crystal, a small object you associate with abundance. Sit quietly. Picture yourself at the centre of a golden current of energy that flows both toward you and away from you. Both directions are the same current.
I am ready to release all fear of running out, all guilt about having more, and all hesitation around giving freely. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow effortless circulation of money, love, and opportunity. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take a slow breath in and all the way out. Picture the current flowing through you: money in, money out, each wave steady and full. See the giving and the receiving as one motion. Spend a minute here.
Write this sentence in your own handwriting, then say it aloud:
This week, I am grateful that overflow and generosity now dance together in every area of my life.
Adapted from the Week 9 Ritual in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
